title: Shipped frontend features in 2-week sprints
context: Delivered frontend features for an e-commerce platform in two-week sprint cycles as a working student developer.
details: Owned tickets from design review through production deploy. Worked primarily in React and Vue with the existing design-system component library.
outcome: Shipped 5+ features per sprint and reduced average ticket age by 30%.

title: Debugged production bugs across React and Vue
context: Triaged and resolved production bugs reported by the QA team and the customer-support escalation queue.
details: Used browser devtools, React DevTools, and the team's structured logging to root-cause each report. Reproduced the bug locally, wrote a regression test, and shipped the fix.
outcome: Resolved 20+ production bugs and reduced the reported error rate by 25%.

title: Wrote unit tests for core modules
context: Added unit tests for three core modules of the e-commerce platform's frontend.
details: Used Vitest and React Testing Library. Covered the cart, checkout, and product-detail flows. Pushed coverage from 45% to 78%.
outcome: Coverage rose from 45% to 78% across the three modules.

title: Collaborated with cross-functional team
context: Worked with a 4-person cross-functional team including design, backend, and QA.
details: Took part in daily standups, sprint planning, and retrospectives. Used GitHub Flow for code review and merge.
outcome: Stable delivery cadence over 6+ months in the team.

title: Migrated product listings to a new API schema
context: Migrated 150+ product listings to a new backend API schema without downtime.
details: Wrote a one-shot migration script that ran against a staging copy of the database. Verified row counts and sample queries, then ran the migration in production during a low-traffic window.
outcome: Migrated 150+ product listings with zero downtime.

title: Participated in code reviews
context: Reviewed pull requests from teammates before they merged.
details: Caught two regressions in the cart flow before they reached staging. Wrote actionable review comments referencing the specific line and the suggested fix.

title: Communicated progress to stakeholders
context: Updated the product owner on sprint progress through weekly demos and written status updates.
details: Prepared short demo videos for two features per sprint, wrote a 1-paragraph status note each Friday, and surfaced blockers early.
outcome: Stable stakeholder trust across the engagement.

title: Wrote internal tooling scripts
context: Wrote small Python scripts for the operations team to automate inventory reconciliation.
details: Replaced a manual spreadsheet reconciliation with a script that diffs the inventory feed against the storefront API output and emails a summary.
outcome: Reduced the team's weekly reconciliation effort from 2 hours to 5 minutes.

title: Shipped production deploys
context: Owned the production deploy for owned services during the sprint.
details: Used the team's CI/CD pipeline to promote builds through staging and production. Watched the error-rate dashboard for 30 minutes after each deploy.
outcome: Owned the deploy process for owned services.

title: Worked in a German-language workplace
context: Operated in a German-language working environment with English-only code and tooling.
details: Wrote status updates and standup notes in German. Participated in German-language retrospectives. Used English for code comments and PR descriptions.
outcome: Contributed effectively in a mixed-language engineering team.
